prompts.heartbreak: a devastated heartbroken ballad, aching vocals over sparse piano
prompts.euphoria: a euphoric bright dance-pop anthem, soaring synths and driving beat
prompts.melancholy: a slow melancholic wistful song, soft muted instrumentation
prompts.rage: an angry aggressive track, distorted guitars and pounding drums
prompts.nostalgia: a warm nostalgic acoustic song that sounds like an old memory
prompts.romantic: a tender romantic love song, intimate vocals and gentle strings
prompts.empowerment: a confident empowering anthem with a strutting beat and bold vocals
prompts.introspective: a quiet introspective confessional song, close-mic vocals and space
